description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The aircraft features a predominantly white body accented with orange on the nose, wingtips, and tail surfaces, giving it a distinctive and sporty appearance. The wings are straight and extend laterally from the lower part of the fuselage, with visible ailerons and no winglets. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all with orange trim. The landing gear is a tricycle type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel, all fixed and exposed. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with a clear canopy, and appears to be designed for a single pilot.
description: A small, white and orange single-propeller airplane with a low-wing, tricycle landing gear, and a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange nose, low-mounted straight wings, and the full length of the fuselage and tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the symmetry of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the propeller, cockpit canopy, and the orange-accented tail and wingtips.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the propeller, forward cockpit, and the tricycle landing gear beneath the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no winglets or visible dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed and non-retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
